fewShots.question: How many sensor readings do we have?
What is the anomaly rate?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE ROW("Anomaly Rate", [Anomaly Rate], "Anomaly Count", [Anomaly Count], "Total Readings", [Total Readings])

fewShots.question: Show me the total readings per site
fewShots.query: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_sites[site_name], "Total Readings", [Total Readings], "Avg Value", [Avg Reading Value])

fewShots.question: How many critical vs warning alerts do we have?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE ROW("Critical Alerts", [Critical Alerts], "Warning Alerts", [Warning Alerts], "Total Alerts", [Total Alerts])

fewShots.question: Which 5 sensors have the most anomalies?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE TOPN(5, ADDCOLUMNS(SUMMARIZE(SensorReading, dim_sensors[sensor_name], dim_sensors[sensor_type]), "Anomalies", CALCULATE([Anomaly Count])), [Anomalies], DESC)

fewShots.question: What is the anomaly rate per zone type?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_zones[zone_type], "Anomaly Rate", [Anomaly Rate], "Total Readings", [Total Readings], "Anomaly Count", [Anomaly Count])

fewShots.question: What is the average temperature per site?
Which site has the most alerts?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE TOPN(1, ADDCOLUMNS(SUMMARIZE(SensorAlert, dim_sites[site_name]), "Total Alerts", CALCULATE([Total Alerts])), [Total Alerts], DESC)

fewShots.question: What is the data quality rate for each sensor type?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_sensors[sensor_type], "Good Quality Rate", [Good Quality Rate], "Total Readings", [Total Readings])

fewShots.question: How many critical alerts in production zones?
fewShots.query: EVALUATE ROW("Critical Alerts in Production", CALCULATE([Critical Alerts], dim_zones[zone_type] = "Production"))
